name: testChangePassword
description: Check if the user can change the password through the profile settings in the user menu
descriptionHtml: Check if the user can change the password through the profile settings in the user menu

testStage.description: Check if the user can change the password through the profile settings in the user menu

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field
Enter new password in the 'Password' field
Enter new password in the 'Repeat Password' field
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field
Enter new password in the 'Password' field
Enter new password in the 'Repeat Password' field
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field
